divergences.claim: round_money rounds a dollar amount to the nearest CENT — two decimal places (quantize to 0.01), rounding half-up. So 1.04 stays 1.04 and 2.03 stays 2.03; the cents are preserved.
divergences.prose: round_money rounds a dollar amount to the nearest CENT — two decimal places (quantize to 0.01), rounding half-up. So 1.04 stays 1.04 and 2.03 stays 2.03; the cents are preserved.
